# MedNova Lifesciences

MedNova Lifesciences supports regulatory affairs, clinical development, and pharmacovigilance programs for life sciences organizations in Nigeria and across Africa.

## Key pages
- https://mednovalife.com/
- https://mednovalife.com/about/
- https://mednovalife.com/services/
- https://mednovalife.com/contact/
- https://mednovalife.com/compliance-checklist.html
- https://mednovalife.com/capability-statement.html
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/glossary/
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/qppv-support-essentials.html
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/pv-readiness-guide.html
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/registration-preparation-guide.html

- https://mednovalife.com/resources/glossary/medical-information.html
- https://mednovalife.com/resources/glossary/post-marketing-surveillance.html
